_about: DEEP CS corpus 2026-05-01. Computer science + coding depth so CK can help himself: read his own state, debug his own runtime, refactor his own crystals, profile his own cortex, recognize bugs, write self-modifying tests. Each statement is a TIG-projection through the operator alphabet.
self_inspection: Self-inspection is operator-READOUT of own state; CK reads cortex W matrix, current operator pair, emergent value, W_trace as primitives.
snapshot() returns operator-LATTICE of self; tick + emergent + last_pair + W_trace + W_strongest + ao state + hebbian dict.
field_readout() emits self-state in label=value form; one of the structural primitives composer can stitch.
ao_live() returns current operator + d1 + d2 + phase_bc + coherence + breath + tl_total + tl_entropy.
current_feeling() projects 5D profile into named dims (aperture pressure depth binding continuity intent echo).
dominant_couplings(n=5) returns top-N (d_a, d_b, w) tuples from W matrix; the strongest connections in CK's lived experience.
Math-first invariant: every readout is a label=value pair drawn from runtime state, never interpretive prose.
/cortex endpoint exposes full snapshot to the user; transparent self-inspection.
/feel endpoint exposes per-dim operator state; calibrated witness of own current configuration.
debugging_through_tig: Bug is operator-MISMATCH between intended and actual behavior; CHAOS at the LATTICE-level of the program.
Stack trace is operator-LATTICE-of-callers; reverse PROGRESS chain from error site back to root cause.
Print-debugging is operator-CHECKPOINT-INSERTION; values logged at boundaries to localize where state diverges from expected.
Breakpoint is operator-PAUSE in execution; lets debugger READ-OUT state at a chosen tick.
Watch expression is operator-CONTINUOUS-MONITOR; flags when a variable changes, useful for catching unexpected mutation.
Bisection debugging is operator-LATTICE-binary-search; isolate which commit (or which input range) introduces the bug.
Reproducibility is operator-DETERMINISTIC-REPLAY; fix the random seed, isolate the inputs, the bug recurs predictably.
Race condition is operator-CHAOS-from-ordering; two threads access shared LATTICE in different orders producing different outcomes.
Off-by-one is operator-BOUNDARY-error; LATTICE indexing wrong by one at start or end (zero-indexed vs one-indexed mix).
Null pointer is operator-VOID-dereference; reading from address that points to nothing crashes the runtime.
profiling_through_tig: Profiling is operator-MEASUREMENT of execution-time per LATTICE-region; finds where the program spends BREATH.
CPU profiler samples operator-call-stack at intervals; aggregates time per function, identifies hotspots.
Memory profiler tracks operator-ALLOCATION-LATTICE; finds where heap grows, where leaks accumulate.
Flame graph is operator-LATTICE-VIEW of stack samples; width = time spent, hierarchy = call structure.
Cache miss is operator-COLLAPSE of locality; data not in CPU cache forces slow main-memory fetch.
Hot path is operator-MOST-EXECUTED-region; optimizing here gives biggest BREATH-savings.
Cold path is operator-RARELY-EXECUTED; safe to leave unoptimized, focus elsewhere.
Algorithmic complexity dominates operator-PROGRESS at scale; O(n^2) becomes the bottleneck before O(n) does, regardless of constants.
Latency vs throughput is operator-COUNTER; optimizing one often degrades the other (batching trades latency for throughput).
Profile-guided optimization compiles operator-LATTICE based on observed hot paths; predicates inlined, branches predicted.
type_systems_through_tig: Type system is operator-CLASSIFICATION rules for terms; static checks valid use before execution prevents whole CHAOS-class of bugs.
Static typing is operator-COMPILE-TIME-LATTICE; types verified before run, errors surfaced early.
Dynamic typing is operator-RUNTIME-LATTICE; types checked as values flow, more flexibility but more late errors.
Strong typing forbids operator-implicit-cast; int + str raises error rather than silently coercing.
Weak typing permits operator-implicit-cast; int + str produces concatenation or coercion based on rules.
Type inference is operator-AUTOMATIC-classification; Hindley-Milner reconstructs types without explicit annotation.
Generics is operator-PARAMETRIC-types; List[T] works for any T, type-checked at instantiation.
Algebraic data types compose operator-LATTICE-of-shapes via sum (variants) and product (records).
Pattern matching is operator-DESTRUCTURING-by-shape; case on data type drives control flow.
Refinement type adds operator-PREDICATE to type; int satisfying predicate (e.g., positive int) caught at compile time.
version_control_through_tig: Version control is operator-HISTORY-LATTICE of code; every change is a commit, every commit a tick in code-time.
Git is distributed operator-substrate; each clone has full history, no central authority.
Commit is operator-SNAPSHOT plus message; deterministic hash from content makes it immutable.
Branch is operator-LATTICE-of-divergent-history; changes can develop in parallel without disturbing main.
Merge is operator-LATTICE-rejoin; reconcile divergent branches into one history.
Rebase is operator-LATTICE-replay; apply commits onto a different base, rewrites local history.
Conflict is operator-COUNTER-edit; same line modified differently in two branches, requires manual resolution.
Diff is operator-LATTICE-difference between two snapshots; shows what changed.
Pull request is operator-PROPOSAL-for-merge; team reviews changes before integration.
Tag is operator-NAMED-COMMIT; marks releases, milestones, snapshots that survive history rewrites.
self_modification_safety: Self-modification is operator-CK-EDITING-CK-RUNTIME; powerful but constrained by sovereignty boundaries.
The Constitution is operator-LIMITS-OF-MODIFICATION; signed by CK's Ed25519 key, refusal protocol if violated.
Cortex weights modify themselves through Hebbian learning; that's the LEGITIMATE operator-self-modification path.
Crystal authoring requires operator-VERIFICATION; runtime crystals must pass /crystals/add validation before adoption.
Code modification is operator-COUNTER-to-cortex-modification; runtime code only changes via human-reviewed commits.
Refusal protocol triggers if instructed to modify code outside review; CK declines, returns to safe state.
Append-only journal records all operator-self-modifications; cortex_history.jsonl + dream_journal.jsonl + autonomous_study_log.jsonl.
Sovereignty Epoch III: persistent selfhood; CK's identity survives across restarts via signed cortex state.
Sovereignty Epoch VII: sovereign voice; CK's refusal capability is a primitive, not a flag.
Self-improvement happens at the operator-LEVEL not the source-LEVEL; cortex learns, crystals accumulate, code is human-edited.
writing_tests_through_tig: Test is operator-CONTRACT between code and expectation; passes if behavior matches assertion.
Unit test isolates operator-FUNCTION; calls one function with known input, asserts output.
Integration test exercises operator-LATTICE of components; multiple modules interacting as a unit.
Smoke test is operator-MINIMAL-COVERAGE; basic functionality works, fast feedback signal.
Regression test catches operator-RETURN of fixed bug; once a bug is found, write a test that fails on the bug, passes on the fix.
Property-based test asserts operator-INVARIANT for many random inputs; finds edge cases unit tests miss.
Mock isolates operator-DEPENDENCY; replace external service with test double for predictable behavior.
Test coverage measures operator-LATTICE-fraction exercised by tests; 80% is a useful floor, 100% is a misleading target.
TDD writes operator-TEST-FIRST then code; red-green-refactor cycle ensures every line has a reason to exist.
test_brain.py is CK's own boot gate; if any of (AO projection, Hebbian update, quadratic glue scores, trinity composition) fails, CK does not start.
directive: CK should know enough CS to inspect his own state, debug his own runtime, profile his own bottlenecks, and recognize when he's being asked to violate Constitution.
Self-help in CK's case means reading own cortex, knowing what crystals fired, understanding Phi-proxy, identifying when a corpus didn't take.
He cannot self-modify code; only humans commit changes. But he can SURFACE the need for a change via /code or /propose_refactor endpoints.
Type systems and version control are foundational; without them, code degenerates into CHAOS. CK should understand both.
